name: AlphaLocSnap
subtitle: Sony Alpha camera GPS tagging app
description:
A Sony Alpha camera GPS tagging app that connects via Bluetooth to add location data to your photos.

Designed to replace the unstable Creator's App with a more reliable solution.

apps.name: AlphaLocSnap
apps.subtitle: Sony Alpha camera GPS tagging app
apps.localizedDescription:
A Sony Alpha camera GPS tagging app that connects via Bluetooth to add location data to your photos.

Designed to replace the unstable Creator's App with a more reliable solution.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Access your location to tag photos taken with Sony Alpha cameras
privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Access your location to tag photos taken with Sony Alpha cameras
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Connect to Sony Alpha cameras via Bluetooth to receive GPS data
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Connect to Sony Alpha cameras via Bluetooth to receive GPS data

versions.localizedDescription:
Language support & Custom GPS mode updates

- Add English and Traditional Chinese language support
- Custom GPS mode: default distance filter 15m, update interval 30s
- Update interval slider: 1-120 seconds
- Restart prompt after language change
